network_summary: Dr. Khalil (Kyle) Takla DDS, President of Bright Dental Care PC, owns and operates a private multi-office dental group across 4 watched Chicagoland ZIPs. The corporate legal entity is Bright Dental Care PC, doing business as Smile Dental Care, Orland Dental Care, and Khalil Takla DDS & Associates PC. No MSO, management company, or PE sponsor has been identified. The Lombard location (837 Westmore-Meyers Rd, Smile Dental Care / Bright Dental Care) is reported closed on Yelp. This is a dentist-owned private multi-office group with no DSO/MSO platform layer.

Documentary corroboration: (1) BBB profile for Orland Dental Care lists Dr. Khalil (Kyle) Takla DDS as President with alternate legal name Khalil Takla DDS & Associates PC (https://www.bbb.org/us/il/orland-park/profile/dentist/orland-dental-care-0654-88021874); (2) Cook County court record names Bright Dental Care PC dba Smile Dental Care, Orland Dental Care, and Dr. Khalil Takla as defendant — confirming the multi-location PC structure (https://cookcountyrecord.com/stories/511779507-dentist-claims-bright-dental-care-classified-him-as-independent-contractor-shorted-him-pay); (3) provider directories (Vitals, WebMD, DentalPlans, ZocDoc) confirm Dr. Khalil Takla practices at all 4 addresses. No MSO, management company, PE sponsor, or DSO platform layer found anywhere.
future_app_notes: 1. Lombard 60148 (Bright Dental Care / Smile Dental Care) — Yelp says CLOSED; verify before including in active corporate floor. 2. The two Archer Ave Chicago locations (60632 at 4893 S Archer Ave and 60638 at 7011 W Archer Ave) share phone (773) 788-9090 — check if one is a duplicate/satellite or if they are genuinely separate offices. 3. No PE/MSO evidence found; if PE or management services agreement surfaces in the future, upgrade to stealth_dso. 4. Orland Park (60462, Khalil Takla DDS & Associates PC) is the flagship with a year_established=2005 and large_group classification — likely the hub of the network.
